description: Immutable bootc-native Fedora workstation OS distributed as an OCI image, with a multi-agent OpenAI-compatible /v1 surface at :8640.

ollama_cpu.role: in-VM CPU light-lane (ollama:latest); router/classifier + verb embeddings + micro-LLMs (real AMD iGPU is the Windows-native server, served as mios-reasoner-cpu)

mios_daemon.role: mios-daemon-agent (log/journal tail; satisfaction monitor; 2 CPU-pinned cores)

laws: USR-OVER-ETC: static config in /usr/lib/<component>.d/; /etc/ for admin overrides only
NO-MKDIR-IN-VAR: every /var/ path declared via usr/lib/tmpfiles.d/*.conf
BOUND-IMAGES: every Quadlet image symlinked in /usr/lib/bootc/bound-images.d/
BOOTC-CONTAINER-LINT: RUN bootc container lint is the final Containerfile instruction
UNIFIED-AI-REDIRECTS: MIOS_AI_ENDPOINT/MODEL/KEY target http://localhost:8640/v1; zero vendor URLs
UNPRIVILEGED-QUADLETS: every Quadlet defines User=, Group=, Delegate=yes
TOML-FIRST: every operator-tunable value lives in mios.toml; no hardcoded constants in scripts/Quadlets
REFINED-QUERY-CARRY: every MiOS-Agent -> sub-agent hop injects the refined plan as a system-message prefix; no sub-agent runs on raw user text
OWUI-THINKING-BLOCKS: sub-agent raw output is wrapped in <details type="reasoning"> for OWUI dropdowns; polished answer is the main content
